releaseReadiness.statement: SearchLint 1.0 is not complete while owner/live/reviewer/publication gates remain open.

phases.title: Reviewer And Rule Quality Gates
phases.description: Complete OD-023 delivery, independent reviewer files, adjudication, and final rule-quality confirmation.

phases.title: Governance Legal And Repository Gates
phases.description: Finish legal approval and hosted GitHub/repository governance before publication or public launch.

phases.title: npm And VS Code Publication Gates
phases.description: Complete public package metadata, npm publication, Marketplace publisher, and extension publication evidence.

phases.title: Production Platform Gates
phases.description: Deploy and verify cloud runtime, storage, database, API, workers, auth, dashboard, observability, backup, and agency surfaces.

phases.title: Live Provider Acceptance Gates
phases.description: Run live Google, Yandex, PageSpeed/CrUX, Stripe, notification, and related provider acceptance.

phases.title: Accessibility Security And Website Gates
phases.description: Complete manual accessibility, DAST, penetration testing, security gates, and deployed public website evidence.

phases.title: Final Release Gates
phases.description: Run final RC, tag, and publication only after every prerequisite gate has evidence.

nonClaims: This runbook does not close release gates.
This runbook does not provide owner, legal, reviewer, deployed, live provider, publication, or final release evidence.
Checklist items remain open until their required evidence exists and the relevant verifier passes.
